snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Day 2 | English
snippet.description:
Welcome to Day 2 of the MPL ID Season 17 Playoffs! 🔥

The battle for the championship continues as the stakes get even higher. Every game, every objective, and every decision can shape a team's journey toward the MPL ID S17 title.

The opening match will feature Team Liquid ID vs GEEK Fam. After surviving the previous round, GEEK faces another major challenge as they take on TLID, a team determined to make a deep Playoff run. Who will keep their championship dreams alive?

In the second match, the Regular Season leaders ONIC will begin their Playoff campaign against Bigetron Esports. ONIC enters as the most dominant and consistent team of the season, while BTR looks to overcome the pressure and continue their pursuit of MPL glory.

With a spot in the next stage on the line, every team will be giving their all on the Land of Dawn. Don't miss another day of intense action as Indonesia's best teams battle for the MPL ID S17 crown!

snippet.title: Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
It will take a Holmes, to save a Holmes. The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‘Adolescence’), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 premieres JULY 1, only on Netflix.

ENOLA HOLMES 1 and ENOLA HOLMES 2 are NOW PLAYING.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

snippet.title: James Arthur - Can I Be Him (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
james arthur - can i be him

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music 🌟

· follow James Arthur:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4IWBUUAFIplrNtaOHcJPRM?si=X7QmRhnTQFOVDKM-ElF5Dw
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/james-arthur/193502798

lyrics:
[verse 1]
you walked into the room
and now my heart's been stolen
you took me back in time to when i was unbroken
now you're all i want
and i knew it from the very first moment
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?
can i be him?

[verse 2]
i heard there was someone but i know he don't deserve you
if you were mine i'd never let anyone hurt you
i wanna dry those tears, kiss those lips
it's all that i've been thinking about
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?

[bridge]
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
oh, can i, can i be him?

[refrain]
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him?

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sang
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there, will you be there
can i be the one you talk about in all your stories
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him

#jamesarthur #canibehim

snippet.title: PALAGI - Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic
snippet.description:
**PALAGI - Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic**

“Palagi” is an original emotional hugot rap song about choosing someone every day, even through distance, pain, misunderstandings, and life’s struggles.

This song is for the person who became your peace in a noisy world. The one you still think about when you are tired, lost, or far away. The one you would still choose, again and again.

If you have someone who feels like home, this song is for you.

Listen, feel, and share this with the person who will always be your “palagi.”

Aaminin ko naman

Sa mata ng tadhana ay
Panalangin ang tangi kong alay
